title: PRD: Global search across workspaces
text:
# PRD — Global search across workspaces
Product area: Search
Status: Shipped
Author: Product team

## Problem
Customers repeatedly request global search across workspaces. This appears in support tickets and NPS feedback for the Search area.

## Proposed solution
Implement global search across workspaces with configuration in workspace settings.

## Success metrics
Reduce Search-related complaints by 30%; adoption > 40% in 60 days.

## Priority
Committed for next quarter.
